questions.q: In solid $\mathrm{NH}_3$, each $\mathrm{NH}_3$ molecule has six other $\mathrm{NH}_3$ molecules as nearest neighbours. The enthalpy of sublimation of $\mathrm{NH}_3$ (s) at its melting point is $30.4 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1}$ and the estimated value of enthalpy of sublimation of $\mathrm{NH}_3(\mathrm{~s})$, when there were no hydrogen bonds, is $15.4 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1}$. What is the average strength of hydrogen bonds in solid $\mathrm{NH}_3$ in $\mathrm{kJ} \mathrm{mol}^{-1}$ ?
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.q: One mole of an ideal monoatomic gas initially at 1200 K and 64 atm is expanded to a final state at 300 K and 1.00 atm . To achieve the above change, a reversible path is constructed that involve an adiabatic expansion in the beginning followed by an isothermal expansion to the final state. Determine the magnitude of net work done by the gas, in $\mathrm{cal} .(\mathrm{R}=2 \mathrm{Cal} / \mathrm{K}-\mathrm{mol}, \ln 2=0.7)$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.q: In a cycle ABCA consisting of isothermal expansion AB , isobaric compression BC \& adiabatic compression CA. Find the $\%$ (approximate) efficiency of cycle. [Given : $\mathrm{T}_{\mathrm{A}}=\mathrm{T}_{\mathrm{B}}=400 \mathrm{~K} ; \gamma=1.5, \ln 2=0.693,2^{\frac{1}{3}}=1.26$]
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Calculate heat of atomization of furan in KJmol-1 using the data



Heats of atomization of C, H, O are 717, 218, 249 KJmol-1 each. Fill your answer dividing by 100
questions.solution:
Writing the formation reaction

4C s +4H g +O g → C 4 H 4 O g

Δ H f ∘ = - 6 2 · 0 = Σ reac BE - Σ product BE

Σ product  BE = Σ reac BE + 6 2 · 0

= 4 × 7 1 7 + 4 × 2 1 8 + 2 4 9 + 6 2

= 2 8 6 8 + 8 7 2 + 2 4 9 + 6 2 = 4 0 5 1  KJ  mol - 1

Σ product  BE  is heat of atomization of product into isolated gaseous atoms. 

Hence answer is 40.51
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: In a process, 701 J of heat is absorbed by a system and 394 J of work is done by the system. What is the change in internal energy (in J) for the process?
questions.solution:
Given, q = + 701 J (heat is absorbed, heance q is positive.)

W = - 394 J (work is done by the system, hence W is negative.)

By first law of thermodynamics;

Internal energy change, Δ U = q + w
        = + 701 J + (-394 J ) = + 307 J.

Hence, internal energy of the system increases by 307 J.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
